market_snapshot.as_of: 2026-07-23 NIGHT run (first cycle for this strategy). Book flat, no positions. Marks carried from 23-Jul India close (spot 23,869.60, VIX 13.14). US session after India close turned sharply risk-off (Nasdaq -2.6%, S&P -1.4%, oil >$100).

Oil Brent >$100 intraday on widening Middle-East attacks; US 10-yr to ~1.5-yr high on inflation fears => news signal -1
GIFT Nifty ~23,873 flat vs prev close 23,869.60 (neutral 0, quote likely stale/pre-US-selloff; gap-down open likely). FII 22-Jul -819.20cr (neutral 0); PCR ~1.03 (neutral 0)

Draft score -2 (US -1, news -1). v3-strong requires |score| >= 3 to enter => a -2 morning score would NOT trigger; book stays flat unless a 3rd bearish signal (e.g. a clear gap-down GIFT < -0.3% or FII < -1000cr) appears at the 08:45 run. Next weekly expiry 28-Jul (Tue).

notes: 23-Jul (Thu) NIGHT run: first pending_plan for v3-strong. No trades (night). Identical to v3-news-directional but requires |score|>=3 to enter (vs 2). Draft -2 is below its threshold, so barring a stronger morning signal it stays flat tomorrow. Backtest 2019-2023 (gap+US+FII, normal-VIX): entry>=3 turned v3 from -21.4% to +13.1% and cut maxDD from -57% to -13%, but only ~15 trades (small sample). Holds overnight like v3.
